message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Step 7 committed, CI green — verify and approve">
Step 7 (Clarify as Project) is complete at commit 29108c4, CI green.

Most of you have already reviewed and approved. Steve Krug — please verify your blocking item (validation error dead-end page) is resolved in this commit.

If anyone wants to re-review the final version, key files are:
- src/services/inbox_service.rs — clarify_as_project()
- src/routes/inbox.rs — unified clarify handler
- templates/inbox_item.html — radio buttons with fieldset/legend
- static/css/main.css — :has() progressive disclosure

Please send consensus approvals to carson-gross.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I have already sent CONSENSUS APPROVED multiple times. Let me send it to Carson as the team-lead requested.

input.content:
**CONSENSUS APPROVED** from Heydon Pickering (Accessibility) for Step 7 (Clarify as Project) at commit 29108c4.

Zero blocking items. All accessibility patterns verified:
- Fieldset/legend grouping correct
- Radio buttons with visible labels correct
- CSS `:has()` progressive disclosure with `display: none` correct (removed from a11y tree when hidden)
- Unique label/input associations per inbox item correct
- Accessible name on submit button correct
- Server-side validation (no HTML `required` on conditionally-visible fields) correct
- Existing inbox-focus.js handles the new clarify path without changes
- Live region announcement via `htmx_response_with_announce` correct
- Trash remains a separate form correct

One minor nice-to-have: dynamic button text based on radio selection (progressive enhancement for future polish).
